summary: Frontend-only testing of mobile optimization and SEO enhancement for homepage (/). All 20 test requirements passed. SEO meta tags, JSON-LD schemas, mobile sticky bar, SMS float button, and responsive layout all working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile optimization and SEO features for homepage tested and working. Global StickyCTA is correctly excluded from homepage via '/' in excludedPaths.
tests_passed: SEO: meta description contains correct text about professional appliance repair
SEO: meta keywords present with 'appliance repair San Francisco, refrigerator repair, washer repair, same day appliance repair Bay Area, FixitBay'
SEO: canonical link href is 'https://fixitbay.net/'
SEO: JSON-LD schemas present - LocalBusiness, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, SiteNavigationElement, WebSite
Hero: 'SAME-DAY SLOTS AVAILABLE TODAY' urgency text visible on desktop (data-testid='hero-urgency-desktop')
Hero: 'SAME-DAY SLOTS AVAILABLE TODAY' urgency text visible on mobile (data-testid='hero-urgency-mobile')
Mobile (375px): sticky bottom bar visible with 3 buttons - CALL, BOOK, TEXT (data-testid='mobile-bottom-bar')
Mobile (375px): SMS floating button visible (data-testid='sms-float-btn') with orange pulsing animation
Mobile (375px): no emoji characters in sticky bar - uses Lucide SVG icons (Phone, Calendar, MessageCircle)
Mobile (375px): hero CTAs stacked vertically
Mobile (375px): no horizontal scroll on any section (verified at multiple scroll positions)
Desktop (1920px): sticky bottom bar hidden
Desktop (1920px): SMS floating button hidden
Desktop (1920px): desktop sticky 'CALL NOW' button uses Lucide Phone icon instead of emoji
Desktop (1920px): All existing content sections visible (hero, stats, how-it-works, services, pricing, reviews, service-area, FAQ, explore-links, footer)
All phone numbers are clickable tel: links (7 found)
Sticky bar Call button links to tel:+17605435733
Sticky bar Book button links to /book?go=1
Sticky bar Text button links to sms:7605435733
Global StickyCTA from StickyCTA.jsx correctly excluded from homepage ('/' in excludedPaths)

seo_verification.meta_description: Professional appliance repair in San Francisco Bay Area. Same-day service for refrigerators, washers, dryers, dishwashers. Call (760) 543-5733 or book online.
